description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: Every action that should be included in the spell must be present in the Executive Sheet. Each executive action is populated in the Executive Sheet under a column and broken down into "input" actions and "derived" actions. An
represents a high-level category, and a Derived Action breaks down the Input Action
into specific, actionable steps or changes. Each action in the Executive Sheet, whether input or derived, must have sufficient provenance to support its presence during the spell.
